docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY ROBINSON, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (ATTN S. KOYA) ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-05-2002 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
NOTE:THIS CLAIM IS AGAINST A GOV'T.AGENCY.
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL

SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION MAR-05-2002, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO MAR-20-2002 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 THE CITY ATTY'S OFFC NEEDS ADDITIONAL TIME TO COMP LETE THE INVESTIGATIONS IN THIS CLAIM.
CERTIFIED MAILING TO MAYOR'S OFFICE - C & C OF SAN FRANCISCO RETURNED TO COURT SIGNED
MEMORANDUM OF INFORMAL BRIEF FILED BY DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (ATTN S. KOYA) $662.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $662.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ROBINSON, WILLIAM IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CITY & COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO (ATTN S.
